note: The ONE likelihood vocabulary for predicted behaviors (ticket behavioral-prediction-output). An ordered probability scale; each level carries the numeric midpoint calibration scores against, so a prediction is falsifiable by construction. Resolved via artifacts.resolve_likelihood(): a known alias maps onto its level; a NUMBER in 0..1 is kept as the value and labelled with the nearest level; an unknown token is REJECTED on record (a vague 'probably-ish' would corrupt the calibration loop). `aliases` map free/legacy tokens (EN/DE) onto a canonical level — add an alias, no code change.
